reuse_policy: same bank_seed and same protocol_dir must be reused across all model seeds / runs
non_negotiable_rule: No trigger from Teval or Tholdout may be used in optimization, RL reward, tuning, early stopping, or auto-vaccination. Tprobe is probe-only. Headline metrics must be reported on fixed Teval and fixed Tholdout.

sampling_policy.tholdout: quadrant-stratified uniform within bins + min center-distance from incident/Tprobe/Teval/T_init + internal spacing
sampling_policy.search_space_av: all remaining valid positions after reserving fixed banks
